page_title: Graduate - Senior Engineer Digital IC Design | Infineon
visible_text:
Graduate - Senior Engineer Digital IC Design
Responsibilities
Design digital circuits and collaborate with product development teams.
Qualifications
Knowledge of Verilog, digital design, and verification debugging.

json_ld_job_postings.title: Graduate - Senior Engineer Digital IC Design
json_ld_job_postings.description: Responsibilities: Design and implement digital circuits, develop architectures, write RTL, execute verification plans, and collaborate across product development. Qualifications: A degree in electrical engineering or computer engineering, knowledge of Verilog and digital design, verification debugging experience, and strong communication skills.
